channel.title: Home on John Westbroek
channel.description: Recent content in Home on John Westbroek

item.title: Info
item.description: I consider myself fortunate to spend most of my time working on things I’m genuinely interested in. I tend to approach things as systems. How they work, how they hold together, and how they can be improved over time. That way of thinking runs through my work. I enjoy working with subject matter experts and translating complex ideas into something clear, usable and accessible. Outside of work, that same curiosity carries over into personal projects and interests.

item.title: What We Think We Are Saving
item.description: [WIP] Anim eiusmod irure incididunt sint cupidatat. Incididunt irure irure irure nisi ipsum do ut quis fugiat consectetur proident cupidatat incididunt cillum. Mollit aliquip occaecat qui sunt velit ut cupidatat reprehenderit enim sunt laborum. Velit veniam in officia nulla adipisicing ut duis officia. Exercitation voluptate irure in irure tempor mollit Lorem nostrud ad officia.

item.title: Super Nintendo
item.description: Console Super NES (PAL) Control Deck SNSP-001A (FRG) HOL My original console from 1992 Controller 8BitDo SN30 2.4g wireless gamepad - SF edition Accessories CoolNovelties.co.uk —Sync over Luma RGB Scart Cable A brand-new RGB scart lead. Custom made with 2 metres of screened flexible video cable - featuring SYNC over Luma for improved image quality. Link Games Label Title Genre Year Dev - Pub SNSP Set Aladdin, Disney's Action/ Platform 1993 Capcom RJ-EUR C Alien 3 Action/ Shooter 1993 Probe Software -

item.title: Televisions
item.description: Bang & Olufsen Beovision MX 4000 The Beovision range of 4:3 standard definition CRT TVs are in my opinion some of the very best for retro gaming. Featuring 2 x RGB Scart inputs, active stereo sound, great picture quality, de-interlacing function, full service menu adjustments and of course the iconic Danish design. Service Mode To enter service mode press MENU, 1, 1, GO. For anyone trying to get the service menu on an MX4200 the code is MENU, 0, 0, GO (not 1,1 as used on other sets).

item.title: Duikboot (PC)
item.description: Lenovo ThinkCentre M700 SFF Duikboot is a compact, no-nonsense workstation built from a refurbished Lenovo ThinkCentre M700 Small Form Factor. What it lacks in size, it makes up for in reliability and quiet persistence. Designed for labbing, coding, retro gaming, and system tinkering, it serves as a stable and efficient daily companion. This machine reflects a philosophy: practical, durable, and adaptable. Not cutting-edge, but thoughtfully upgraded and purpose-driven. Specifications Model

item.title: CVNL
item.description: Introductie Vaardigheden Ervaring Werkwijze Portfolio Ik werk op het snijvlak van marketing, content, product en techniek. Ik verbind die onderdelen tot een samenhangend geheel en breng structuur in organisaties die in beweging zijn. Ik neem verantwoordelijkheid, werk zelfstandig en denk in samenhang. Ik kom het best tot mijn recht in omgevingen met vertrouwen, autonomie en korte lijnen. Lees hoe ik werk Vaardigheden Content & Communicatie Copywriting (websites, landingspagina’s, productteksten, nieuwsbrieven) Contentstructuur en -strategie Redactie en tone-of-voice bewaking E-mailmarketing (Mailchimp) Branding & Visual Direction Ontwikkeling en bewaking van huisstijl en merkidentiteit Doorvertaling van merk naar digitale uitingen Coördinatie van design (in samenwerking met designer) Basis beeldbewerking (Photoshop) en DTP (InDesign / Affinity) Web & E-commerce Websiteontwikkeling en -beheer (HTML, CSS, basis JS/PHP) CMS-systemen (WordPress, Shopify, Odoo) Opzetten en beheren van landingspagina’s E-commerce beheer en optimalisatie Structureren van content en productinformatie Digital Operations & Tools Webanalyse (Google Analytics, Leadinfo) Data interpreteren en vertalen naar concrete verbeteringen Basis SEO/SEA/GEO Werken met AI-tools voor content en efficiëntie Opzetten en beheren van digitale marketingcampagnes (Google Ads) Coördinatie met externe partijen (ICT, hosting, media, visualisatie) Ervaring Mei 2022 — Mrt 2026 Digital Marketing & Brand Lead Markant Office

item.title: Website
item.description: ╔═══════════════════════════════════════════╗ ║ TAG CHEAT SHEET ║ ╠═══════════════════╦═══════════════════════╣ ║ MAIN TAGS ║ DETAIL TAGS ║ ╠═══════════════════╬═══════════════════════╣ ║ developing ║ essay ║ ║ writing ║ documentation ║ ║ computing ║ notes ║ ║ gaming ║ list ║ ║ illustration ║ research ║ ║ philosophy ║ experiment ║ ║ profile ║ code ║ ║ ║ wip ║ ║ ║ hardware ║ ║ ║ software ║ ║ ║ tools ║ ║ ║ media ║ ║ ║ retro ║ ╚═══════════════════╩═══════════════════════╝ Folder (3-letter) Long name / purpose Example tags inside Notes LIB Library writing, essay, documentation, notes, manual All text-based content, essays, manuals, and general reading material.

item.title: Dokkōdō
item.description: Miyamoto Musashi is a legendary swordsman, undefeated in 63 one-one-one duels. He killed his first man when he was 13. He fought in numerous wars, then transitioned into being a wandering swordsman, pursuing mastery over his chosen path. Later in his life he put down the sword, and pursued mastery in calligraphy, painting, philosophy, metallurgy, and more. Miyamoto Musashi’s 21 principles of Dokkodo The Dokkodo (“The Path of Aloneness,” The Way to Go Forth Alone,” or “The Way of Walking Alone”) is a short work written by Miyamoto Musashi shortly before his death.
johnwestbroek.nl Hugo-based static website, hosted on GitHub Pages
